title: Sticky date label hidden behind channel column (wrong sticky offset)
description: Date label's position:sticky uses left:0, which is the scrollport's true left edge -- but that's visually behind/under the sticky channel column (0-200px) and its higher z-index corner box. Needs left:CHANNEL_COL_WIDTH so it sticks flush against the right edge of the channel column instead.

title: Search: don't hide programmes within a matching channel
description: GuideGrid.tsx's visibleProgrammes() filters out any programme not individually matching the search query, even within a channel that already matched by name (e.g. CKCO channel matches 'CKCO' but its programme titles don't contain 'CKCO', so all its programmes were hidden). Search should only filter which channels appear; once a channel is shown, all its programmes should render. Confirmed via a real 603MB feed + a diagnostic run of the actual tokenizer that parsing itself is correct - this is purely a grid filtering bug.
close_reason: Removed the per-programme query filter from visibleProgrammes() in GuideGrid.tsx — search now only decides which channel rows appear (via matchingChannelIds), and once a channel is shown all of its programmes render, highlighted where they individually match. Confirmed root cause first by running the real, unmodified tokenizer against the actual 603MB epg.guru Canada feed outside the app — parsing was correct (CKCO's channel + all 230 programmes indexed fine), so the bug was isolated to grid-level search filtering, not data loss. Verified fix with Playwright: channel-name-only match now shows all its programmes; programme-title match still shows the rest of that channel's programmes too; non-matching channels stay excluded.

title: Search box with match highlighting in the guide grid
description: Add a search TextInput (toolbar) filtering/highlighting matching channel names and programme titles (maybe desc too) in GuideGrid — highlight matching cells (border/glow) as the user types, without necessarily hiding non-matches.
close_reason: SearchBox (debounced 200ms) actually filters the grid now: non-matching channel rows are dropped from the virtualizer entirely, and within a matching channel only its matching programmes render. HighlightText wraps the matched substring in <mark>. Match count ('X matching channels / Y matching programmes') moved into the corner cell instead of a separate row. Date labels are now sticky per-calendar-day (nested position:sticky within each day's own absolutely-positioned box) so the current date stays pinned while scrolling through it. Also fixed a real React warning found in testing: ProgrammeCell was mixing the 'border' shorthand with a 'borderLeft' longhand override, which trips a DOM style-conflict warning on rerender — switched to explicit longhand properties throughout.

title: Fix lonely upload button row when nothing is loaded yet
description: SourceBar's small upload icon button is redundant with EmptyState's big upload CTA when status!=='ready'. Hide SourceBar's upload-mode row entirely until something is loaded (or show nothing) so there's no duplicate/lonely button.
close_reason: SourceBar now returns null in upload mode when status !== 'ready', since EmptyState already shows the big Upload CTA in that case. The small swap-file icon button only appears once a source is actually loaded.

title: Extract and render XMLTV <desc> in the inspector
description: Add optional desc field to ProgrammeEntry (types.ts), extract via extractFirstElementText(src,'desc') in tokenizer.ts (both emitComplete and emitMalformed), render as a paragraph in XmlInspector's info section.
close_reason: Added desc field to ProgrammeEntry, extracted via extractFirstElementText in both emitComplete/emitMalformed, rendered as a dimmed paragraph in the inspector info section.

title: Redesign click-to-inspect: info+thumbnail header with XML source in a collapsible section
description: InspectTarget becomes a discriminated union carrying the full ChannelEntry/ProgrammeEntry (not just label/byte-range), so XmlInspector can render a rich header: channel logo+name+id, or programme title/sub-title/category badge/formatted time range/channel id. Well-formed/malformed badges stay near the top; raw XML (CodeMirror) moves behind a 'Show XML source' toggle.
close_reason: InspectTarget is now a discriminated union carrying full ChannelEntry/ProgrammeEntry+channelName+channelIcon. XmlInspector shows a rich header (logo/thumbnail, title, sub-title, category badge, formatted time range, channel name) with badges, and raw XML moves behind a 'Show XML source' toggle. Fixed a real bug found in testing: CodeMirror was mounting inside a Mantine Collapse while still zero-height, so it never rendered visibly — removed the Collapse wrapper since the effect already gates mount/unmount on sourceOpen.

title: Clicking the loading spinner/progress cancels the in-flight load
description: StatusArea's Loader/Progress becomes clickable, calling a store cancel action that also resets status/progress to idle (cancelLoad currently only tears down the worker, doesn't reset status).
close_reason: StatusArea's loading/checking indicator is now a clickable UnstyledButton calling cancelLoad(), which resets status/progress. Added a loadGeneration token in epgStore so an in-flight HEAD request can't resurrect a cancelled load.

title: Programme coloring: dark left border + low-opacity category fill; remove legend pills
description: ProgrammeCell background becomes a low-alpha rgba tint of the category color (hexToRgba helper) instead of flat dark-5, left border stays solid/full-opacity for contrast. Remove CategoryLegend component entirely per user preference.
close_reason: ProgrammeCell background is now hexToRgba(color, 0.18) instead of flat neutral; border-left stays solid full-opacity. Removed CategoryLegend component and its usage entirely.

title: Rework controls area: URL lookup into Settings, slim source bar, big empty-state upload
description: Remove the collapsible URL-bar toggle from the main row. Settings modal gains a 'Load from URL' section (input+Go+Presets) alongside the CORS proxy field. New slim SourceBar.tsx (upload icon + current source label + refresh-if-url) replaces the old UrlBar layout. Empty state (no source loaded) gets a large centered Upload CTA in the main content area instead of a small top-left button.
close_reason: Settings now has a source-mode SegmentedControl (Upload/Direct URL) with a reactive zustand+persist settingsStore; SourceBar.tsx renders the matching control in the main toolbar; EmptyState.tsx shows a big Upload CTA or a URL hint depending on mode.

title: Guide grid: date row, now-line, category color+legend, sub-title, auto-scroll to now-30min
description: GuideGrid.tsx: two-tier ruler (date+hour, local time), live now-line indicator, auto-scroll on load. tokenizer.ts+types.ts: extract category/subTitle. New src/lib/categoryColors.ts: global first-seen-order color assignment from dataviz skill's validated dark 8-hue palette, neutral fallback past 8. ProgrammeCell.tsx: category bg color + sub-title line, taller rows. Legend under EpgHeaderInfo.
close_reason: Verified via Playwright: date/hour ruler, live now-line (auto-scroll to now-30min confirmed working), category-colored left-border stripes, sub-title display, all rendering correctly.

title: Upload-first UX: collapsible URL bar, settings modal in header, dedicated status area
description: UrlBar.tsx: Upload primary, URL/Go/Refresh/Presets behind a Collapse toggle. SettingsMenu.tsx: Menu->Modal, triggered via AppHeader actions prop (no ui-kit change). New StatusArea.tsx (Progress+Alert) rendered outside the controls Group so it never reflows buttons.
close_reason: Upload is now the primary action; URL bar/Go/Refresh/Presets collapsed behind a toggle (auto-opens if ?url= present). Settings moved into AppHeader's actions prop as a Modal (no ui-kit change needed). New StatusArea.tsx renders progress/error in its own block, no longer inline in the controls Group.

title: CodeMirror dark theme for XmlInspector
description: New src/lib/codeMirrorTheme.ts: EditorView.theme({dark:true}) matching Mantine dark vars + syntaxHighlighting via HighlightStyle (tags from @lezer/highlight, add as explicit dep). Wire into XmlInspector.tsx extensions.
close_reason: Added src/lib/codeMirrorTheme.ts (Mantine-CSS-var-based dark theme + syntax highlight style reusing dataviz-validated dark categorical hexes), wired into XmlInspector.tsx extensions.

title: CI fix: Node 20->22, drop npm cache (no committed lockfile)
description: deploy.yml: bump node-version to 22, remove cache: npm from setup-node since package-lock.json is intentionally gitignored and setup-node's cache option needs a lockfile to hash.
close_reason: Bumped to Node 22, removed cache: npm (no committed lockfile to key against).

title: Optional serverless CORS proxy fallback (Cloudflare Worker)
description: Ship an optional, user-deployed Cloudflare Worker (proxy/worker.js + wrangler.toml) that fetches a target URL server-side and re-adds permissive CORS headers restricted to the app's own origin, with SSRF guards (block private/internal IP ranges) and a size cap. App gains a settings field (localStorage) for the proxy URL; worker retries through it when a direct fetch fails.
close_reason: proxy/worker.js (Cloudflare Worker, SSRF-guarded) + wrangler.toml + README; app Settings menu stores proxy URL in localStorage, worker retries through it on direct-fetch failure.

title: Local file upload (xml/xml.gz) bypassing CORS entirely
description: Add an Upload button + file input in UrlBar. Feed the selected File's stream directly into the existing worker pipeline (File is structured-cloneable via postMessage) alongside the URL-fetch path, sharing the same decompression/indexing/OPFS code. No network CORS concerns since it's a local file.
close_reason: Upload button + hidden file input feed File.stream() into the same worker pipeline via a new 'load-file' message type. Verified end-to-end incl. ?url= param clearing.

title: Click-to-inspect XML viewer (CodeMirror 6)
description: XmlInspector.tsx: on-demand OPFS byte-range read + TextDecoder, read-only CodeMirror 6 with @codemirror/lang-xml, DOMParser well-formedness check surfaced via @codemirror/lint, malformed badge for index-time flagged entries.
close_reason: XmlInspector.tsx: CodeMirror 6 read-only + xml() + lint, DOMParser well-formedness badge. Verified well-formed and syntax-error paths both render correctly.

title: EPG header info panel (generator-info-name parsing)
description: EpgHeaderInfo.tsx displays parsed root <tv generator-info-name/-url> attributes captured by the worker during indexing.
close_reason: EpgHeaderInfo.tsx parses and displays <tv generator-info-name/-url>. Verified against a real header string.

title: PWA + GitHub Pages deploy workflow
description: Copy what-to-read's deploy.yml (build -> upload-pages-artifact -> deploy-pages), public/sw.js (cache-first, commit-hash cache busting), manifest.webmanifest, footer commit-hash pill + checkForUpdates/wireUpdateReload. Add NODE_AUTH_TOKEN step to the build job for the GitHub Packages install.
close_reason: deploy.yml (build+deploy-pages), sw.js with commit-hash cache busting, manifest.webmanifest, Footer.tsx update-check pill all implemented.

title: Virtualized guide grid (TanStack Virtual)
description: GuideGrid.tsx with row (channels) + column (time) virtualization, ChannelCell.tsx / ProgrammeCell.tsx, scheme-validated + onError-guarded channel logo .
close_reason: GuideGrid.tsx: TanStack Virtual row virtualization + windowed horizontal programme rendering, sticky channel column/time ruler. Verified visually.

title: epgStore (Zustand) + source-switch unload semantics
description: state/epgStore.ts holding index + OPFS file handle/name; switching sources deletes previous OPFS file and resets store before starting new fetch, so only one source is ever resident.
close_reason: epgStore (zustand) wired with cancelLoad() unloading prior source/worker before every new load.

title: URL bar, presets panel, ?url= param sync, 500MB size warning
description: UrlBar.tsx (text input + Go/Refresh), urlValidation.ts (http/https scheme allowlist), presets.ts (localStorage CRUD), SizeWarningModal.tsx, history.replaceState sync of ?url=, HEAD-request Content-Length pre-check with mid-download fallback.
close_reason: UrlBar with Go/Refresh, presets, ?url= sync, and HEAD-based 500MB warning modal implemented and verified via Playwright.

title: Web Worker XMLTV streaming parser with OPFS byte storage
description: workers/epgParser.worker.ts: fetch in worker, gzip via native DecompressionStream, write decompressed bytes to OPFS via createSyncAccessHandle (in-memory Uint8Array fallback if OPFS unavailable), byte-level tag boundary scanning building channel/programme/header index incrementally, malformed-entry flagging, progress postMessage.
close_reason: epgParser.worker.ts: streaming fetch, native gzip DecompressionStream, byte-level tag scanner, OPFS sync-access-handle storage with in-memory fallback. Verified end-to-end.

title: Scaffold epg-viewer Vite+React+TS project
description: package.json, .npmrc, postcss.config.cjs, vite.config.ts (base '/viewer/', commitHash + swCacheVersion plugin), tsconfig.json, index.html, src/main.tsx, src/vite-env.d.ts, src/types/dispatch-ui-kit.d.ts ambient shim.
close_reason: Vite+React+TS scaffold built and verified (npm install + npm run build clean).

title: No-auth app shell with ui-kit AppProviders + AppHeader
description: src/App.tsx renders AppProviders -> AppShell -> AppHeader (logo/appName/version/githubUrl) with no LoginScreen, no onLogout/username. Depends on the ui-kit 0.1.9 patch.
close_reason: App.tsx renders AppProviders+AppShell+AppHeader with no LoginScreen/onLogout, verified no Logout button appears with ui-kit 0.1.9.

title: Patch ui-kit AppHeader to make logout section conditional on onLogout prop
description: In sethwv-plugins-dev/ui-kit/src/AppHeader.jsx, wrap the username/Logout Stack (lines ~136-147) in {onLogout && (...)} so apps with no auth (like epg-viewer) don't get a dead Logout link. Bump ui-kit/package.json to 0.1.9 and publish per existing publish-ui-kit.yml flow.
close_reason: AppHeader.jsx patched (onLogout now optional, logout block conditional); package.json version left untouched since publish-ui-kit.yml bumps it itself via workflow_dispatch. Awaiting user commit+push+publish trigger.

title: Regenerate PWA icons with more padding (smaller logo within canvas, matching multiview)
description: multiview's icon-512.png shows the logo at roughly 60-65% of canvas size with generous background padding (--scale ~0.65), vs our current scale=1.0 edge-to-edge fill. Regenerate icon-192/icon-512 with a smaller scale via generate-pwa-icons.py; logo.png (favicon) stays untouched since --scale doesn't affect it.
close_reason: Regenerated icon-192/icon-512 with --scale 0.65, matching multiview's ~60-65% fill proportions. logo.png (favicon) unaffected.

title: Polish inspector modal layout (dividers, spacing) now that it has more content
description: Add visual separation (Divider) between the info header block and the well-formed/malformed badges + XML toggle section in XmlInspector.tsx; tidy spacing now that desc is being added.
close_reason: Added Divider between the info header and the badges row, moved the Show XML source toggle inline with the badges (ml=auto), consistent gap='lg' spacing.

title: CSP + URL/img scheme hardening pass
description: Add <meta http-equiv=Content-Security-Policy> to index.html, confirm no dangerouslySetInnerHTML anywhere, verify prod build needs no unsafe-eval.
close_reason: Fixed a real CSP/urlValidation mismatch found during testing: CSP only allowed https: for connect-src/img-src while urlValidation.ts accepts http: too. CSP now matches (http: + https:).

title: Icon generation once logo is provided
description: Run sethwv-plugins-dev/scripts/generate-pwa-icons.py against the provided logo into epg-viewer/public, hand-sync theme_color/background_color into manifest.webmanifest and index.html meta tag.
close_reason: Padded the 512x436 source logo onto a transparent 512x512 canvas (avoids the generator's plain resize stretching it), then ran sethwv-plugins-dev/scripts/generate-pwa-icons.py against epg-viewer/public. Fixed index.html/manifest.webmanifest which referenced icon.svg/favicon-32.png/apple-touch-icon.png (leftover from an earlier mismatched convention) to point at the actual generated logo.png/icon-192.png/icon-512.png. Verified the logo renders correctly in the app header.
